name: Chile Con Queso (Chile Cheese Dip)
recipeIngredient: 1 medium tomato, peeled and chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler over low heat, melt the cheeses.
2. When the cheese has melted, gradually stir in the heavy cream, stirring constantly.
3. Add the remaining ingredients: chopped tomato, onion, parched green chiles, and crushed garlic.
4. Stir to blend the flavors. If more cream is needed, add it gradually, a little at a time.
5. Serve warm in a chafing dish or similar serving vessel.
Yield: approximately 2 cups.
